name: Homebridge
description: Bridge non-HomeKit smart devices into Apple Home for iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and HomePod.
longDescription:
Homebridge emulates the iOS HomeKit API so unsupported smart home devices can appear in Apple Home.

This ServApp uses the official Homebridge Docker image, persists Homebridge configuration and plugins under /homebridge, and runs the Homebridge container in host networking mode for HomeKit discovery.
